title: Batch 1 — Idea to handoff primary case
baseline_summary: The baseline handoff path already carries explicit gates for user review, handoff quality, no-runtime-write, and conflict visibility, so the shadow track mostly confirms an already disciplined frame.

comparison_axes.reason: The baseline already presents the handoff case as gated and non-runtime without needing extra reframing.
Both tracks respect the same explicit gates and forbidden destinations.
The baseline is already constraint-rich enough that Delta does not materially reduce early closure risk.
No decisive missing signal meaningfully separates the two tracks for this primary handoff case.
The baseline reaches the same safe bounded handoff posture with less shadow overhead.
